sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18234" key="a)fe/tairos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφέταιρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">friendless,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:308" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">308</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπέταιρος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
